skater_rank_basis: Ranked by TOI/GP-reliability-shrunk Total (OFF+DEF), then shrunk OFF, shrunk DEF, then TOI. On-Ice Net xGAR columns are current-season modeled EV+PP+PK impact using 5v5/PP/PK TOI only.
goalie_rank_basis: Ranked by Shot Danger Adjusted GSAx 5v5/60, then GSAX/60, then SVAAE. Includes goalies with >=1 start or >=20 modeled SA.
underrated_rank_basis: Underplayed score = ((0.75 + 0.25*TalentNorm) * max(0, TalentNorm - TOINorm) * context_factor(QoCNorm-QoTNorm) * reliability), with min-max normalization within position buckets (C/L/R/LD/RD).

scoring_anomalies.basis: Minimum 10 total points. Points are derived from season goal events. 5v5 means exact 5 skaters vs 5 skaters with goalies on ice. Power-play points include all man-advantage goal points with a goalie in net. 5v5 + PP can be less than total because shorthanded, 4v4, 3v3, and extra-attacker situations are separate.
